name: Sharma Ji Ki Chai
address: Ahmamau Chauraha, near IIIT Lucknow campus, Lucknow
description: The go-to chai stall for IIIT Lucknow students. Sharma Ji serves piping hot masala chai and fresh samosas at pocket-friendly prices. A daily ritual for most campus residents.
reviews_summary: Cheapest and best chai near campus. The samosas are fresh. Perfect for a quick break between classes.

name: Baba Ka Dhaba
address: Ahmamau Road, near IIIT Lucknow campus
description: A pocket-friendly dhaba right outside IIIT Lucknow campus. Serves simple home-style food that's a lifesaver when hostel mess food isn't cutting it. The dal fry and egg curry are student staples.
reviews_summary: Cheap and filling. Not fancy but honest home-cooked food. Every IIIT student eats here at least once a week. Quick service.

name: Maggi Point (IIIT Campus Area)
address: Near IIIT Lucknow Campus Gate, Ahmamau
description: The unofficial late-night canteen of IIIT Lucknow. When you're coding at midnight and hunger strikes, Maggi Point is the answer. Simple menu but hits different at 1 AM.
reviews_summary: Every IIIT student's midnight savior. Cheese Maggi after a coding marathon is a vibe. Basic but essential campus life experience.

name: Mili Restaurant
address: Near Saroj Institute, Ahmamau, Lucknow
description: A no-frills restaurant barely 500m from IIIT campus. Serves basic North Indian and Chinese food at student-friendly prices. Popular for quick lunch outings from campus.
reviews_summary: Very close to IIIT. Food is decent for the price. Good option when you want to sit in a proper restaurant without traveling far.

name: Shri Balaji Hotel & Restaurant
address: Ahmamau Chauraha, Sultanpur Road, Lucknow
description: A reliable all-rounder near Ahmamau Chauraha offering North Indian, South Indian, and Chinese options. Popular for its filling thalis. Good variety and very affordable.
reviews_summary: Decent thali restaurant near campus. Good variety. Chole Bhature is popular in the morning. Clean enough for a casual meal.

name: Joyful Food Cafe and Restaurant
address: Kulli Khera Road, Sarsawan, Arjunganj, Ahmamau, Lucknow
description: A casual cafe near the IIIT area serving affordable fast food and Chinese dishes. Popular among students for momos and quick bites between classes.
reviews_summary: Good momos and fast food at pocket-friendly prices. Nice for a change from regular dhaba food. Close to campus.

name: Purple Basil
address: Rooftop, Comfort Hotel Vista, near Best Price Walmart, Golf City, Lucknow
description: A stunning rooftop restaurant at Comfort Hotel Vista near Golf City. Known for its pool-side ambiance, diverse multi-cuisine menu, and beautifully plated dishes. One of the highest-rated restaurants near IIIT.
reviews_summary: Amazing rooftop ambiance with pool view. Food quality is exceptional. Mushroom Duplex is a must-try. Great for special occasions.

name: Vintclub Resort
address: Plot No. 2, IT Park-3, Amar Shaheed Path, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: A resort property near Lulu Mall offering a relaxing dining experience. The poolside setting combined with multi-cuisine food makes it a popular weekend hangout for groups and friends.
reviews_summary: Great ambiance for a resort dining experience. Good for friend group outings. Poolside seating is a plus. Food is decent.

name: The 19th Hole
address: Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: A stylish bar and kitchen in Sushant Golf City, operating since 2013. Known for its cocktail menu, Pan Asian dishes, and relaxed dining atmosphere. Has both indoor and outdoor seating.
reviews_summary: Good cocktails and decent food. Nice outdoor seating. Slightly pricey but the vibe justifies it. Popular among working professionals.

name: Plan B Food Court
address: Near Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Amar Shaheed Path, Lucknow
description: An open-air food court near Lulu Mall featuring multiple food stalls under one roof. Offers a variety of cuisines at affordable prices with both indoor and outdoor seating options.
reviews_summary: Good variety of food at one place. Nice outdoor seating. Affordable for groups. Popular among young crowds.

name: Domino's Pizza (Sultanpur Road)
address: Sultanpur Road, near IIIT Lucknow, Lucknow
description: The closest delivery option for IIIT Lucknow students when campus food gets boring. Quick, reliable, and open late. Perfect for group study night orders.
reviews_summary: Standard Domino's quality. Fast delivery to campus. Good combo deals for students. Nothing fancy but gets the job done.

name: Kebab Konnection
address: Gomti Nagar Extension, Lucknow
description: A kebab-focused eatery in Gomti Nagar Extension known for its excellent Kakori and Galouti kebabs. Delivers to the IIIT area and is a great alternative to trekking to Aminabad for kebab cravings.
reviews_summary: Fantastic kebabs without going to old Lucknow. The Kakori kebabs are top-notch. Great delivery option for campus students.

name: The Big Grill
address: Phoenix Palassio Mall, Gomti Nagar Extension, Lucknow
description: A premium grill and fine dining restaurant inside Phoenix Palassio. Known for its expertly grilled meats, seafood, and rich North Indian curries. The Angoori Gulab Jamun dessert is legendary.
reviews_summary: Outstanding grilled dishes. The tangadi and tikka are perfectly cooked. Premium experience inside the mall. Worth the splurge.

name: Cafe Delhi Heights
address: Phoenix Palassio Mall, Gomti Nagar Extension, Lucknow
description: A popular chain cafe inside Phoenix Palassio. Known for Instagrammable interiors, fusion menu, and generous portions. Great for a casual outing with friends.
reviews_summary: Nice ambiance inside the mall. Good portions. Can get noisy on weekends. Truffle fries are a crowd favorite.

name: The Irish House
address: Phoenix Palassio Mall, Gomti Nagar Extension, Lucknow
description: An upscale pub and kitchen inside Phoenix Palassio. Known for its lively atmosphere, great cocktails, and European-inspired bar food. Ideal for celebrations and evening outings.
reviews_summary: Best cocktails in Lucknow malls. Live music on weekends. Pricey but the vibe makes up for it. Great for date nights.

name: Chili's American Grill & Bar
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Amar Shaheed Path, Lucknow
description: The American casual dining chain inside Lulu Mall. Great for when you're craving Western food. Known for generous portions and the iconic Molten Chocolate Cake.
reviews_summary: Good American-style food in Lucknow. Portions are huge. The molten lava cake is a must-order. Nice for a different dining experience.

name: Punjab Grill
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Amar Shaheed Path, Lucknow
description: A premium North Indian restaurant inside Lulu Mall, known for its refined Punjabi cuisine. Highly rated with consistently excellent kebabs, rich curries, and warm service.
reviews_summary: One of the best-rated restaurants in Lulu Mall. Butter chicken is exceptional. A bit premium but quality justifies the price.

name: Gola Sizzlers
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Amar Shaheed Path, Lucknow
description: Famous for its theatrical sizzler presentations inside Lulu Mall. The sizzling hot plates arrive at your table with dramatic smoke and aroma. A fun dining experience for families and groups.
reviews_summary: The sizzler presentations are fun. Large portions. The brownie sizzler dessert is a crowd favorite. Good family restaurant.

name: Barbeque Nation
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: The well-known buffet chain with a live-grill-on-the-table concept inside Lulu Mall. Great for birthday celebrations and group outings. Unlimited starters, mains, and desserts.
reviews_summary: Fun experience with the table grill. Good for groups and celebrations. Lunch is cheaper than dinner. Cajun potatoes are addictive.

name: Starbucks (Lulu Mall)
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: The go-to spot for caffeine lovers inside Lulu Mall. Clean, air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi enabled — perfect for study sessions or remote work. Premium pricing but the experience matches.
reviews_summary: Standard Starbucks experience. Good Wi-Fi for working. A bit overpriced for students but nice place to sit and study.

name: Costa Coffee (Lulu Mall)
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: Another excellent cafe option inside Lulu Mall, slightly more affordable than Starbucks. Good coffee and a quieter atmosphere for studying or catching up with friends.
reviews_summary: Good coffee at a slightly lower price than Starbucks. Quieter seating available. Nice pastries. Good alternative for studying.

name: PizzaExpress (Lulu Mall)
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: A premium pizza chain inside Lulu Mall specializing in artisanal, hand-stretched pizzas. More refined than your typical fast-food pizza. The thin-crust Romana style is their specialty.
reviews_summary: Best artisanal pizza in Lucknow malls. The dough balls starter is amazing. Quality is noticeably better than chain pizza. Worth the price.

name: Barkaas Indo Arabic Restaurant
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: One of the few Arabic and Middle Eastern restaurants in Lucknow, located inside Lulu Mall. Offers Mandi rice, shawarma, and authentic kunafa dessert. A refreshing change from typical North Indian fare.
reviews_summary: Unique cuisine option in Lucknow. The Mandi rice is well-done. Kunafa dessert is a highlight. Good for trying something different.

name: McDonald's (Sultanpur Road)
address: Sultanpur Road, near Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: Quick, reliable fast food near the IIIT area. Open late and perfect for quick hunger pangs. The McAloo Tikki is a student budget staple.
reviews_summary: Standard McDonald's. Quick delivery. Good for late-night cravings. McAloo Tikki is unbeatable for the price.

name: Biryani By MBA Wala
address: Near Sushant Golf City, Sultanpur Road, Lucknow
description: A quirky-named biryani delivery joint popular in the IIIT area. Started by MBA graduates, hence the name. Their Chicken Dum Biryani is well-spiced and comes in generous portions.
reviews_summary: Fun name, good biryani. Generous portions for the price. Popular delivery option for campus students. The mutton variant is better.

name: Wow! Momo (Lulu Mall)
address: Food Court, Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: The popular momo chain at Lulu Mall food court. Offers every possible momo variation — steamed, fried, tandoori, and even chocolate momos. Budget-friendly and quick.
reviews_summary: Good momos at reasonable prices. The chocolate momo is worth trying once. Great for a quick snack while shopping at Lulu Mall.

name: Subway (Near IIIT Area)
address: Sultanpur Road, Lucknow
description: A healthier fast food option near the IIIT campus area. Customizable subs let you pick exactly what you want. Popular for delivery to campus.
reviews_summary: Standard Subway quality. Good when you want something lighter than pizza. Delivery to campus is convenient. Paneer tikka sub is popular.

name: Bikanervala (Lulu Mall)
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: A well-known vegetarian restaurant and sweet shop chain inside Lulu Mall. Perfect for a pure veg thali, chaat, or grabbing boxes of sweets. Consistently good quality across outlets.
reviews_summary: Great veg thali and sweets. Chole Bhature is excellent. Good for a quick, clean vegetarian meal. Sweet boxes are great for gifting.

name: KFC (Sultanpur Road)
address: Sultanpur Road, near Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: The go-to fried chicken spot near IIIT. Quick delivery and consistent quality. Perfect for when kebab cravings hit but you don't want to travel far.
reviews_summary: Reliable fried chicken near campus. Hot Wings are a student favorite. Quick delivery. Works well for group orders.

name: Aryan's, The Starter House
address: Vipin Khand, Gomti Nagar, Lucknow
description: Popular among young crowds for its generous portions of starters and appetizers. The Afghani Chicken and Paneer Tikka are top sellers. Opens only in the evening.
reviews_summary: Great starters at great prices. Huge portions. Gets crowded after 8 PM. Good veg and non-veg options both.

name: Tunday Kababi
address: Naaz Cinema Road, Aminabad, Lucknow
description: The legendary Tunday Kababi, established in 1905, is synonymous with Lucknow's culinary identity. Famous worldwide for its melt-in-the-mouth Galouti Kebabs made with a secret blend of 160 spices. A must-visit for anyone in Lucknow. Worth the trip from campus.
reviews_summary: Tourists and locals alike swear by the Galouti kebabs. The Aminabad branch is the authentic one. Affordable and iconic. A Lucknow pilgrimage.

name: Royal Cafe
address: Hazratganj, Lucknow
description: Royal Cafe in the heart of Hazratganj is a Lucknow institution. Best known for inventing the iconic Basket Chaat (Tokri Chaat). A must-visit for the authentic Lucknow street food experience.
reviews_summary: The Basket Chaat is a Lucknow icon. Great for families. Gets crowded on weekends. Good vegetarian options too.

name: Wahid Biryani
address: Aminabad, Lucknow
description: Wahid Biryani is an institution for Lucknowi dum biryani. Slow-cooked with aromatic spices and saffron, their biryani is rich, fragrant, and steeped in tradition. A must-try for biryani lovers.
reviews_summary: Some of the best biryani in UP. Authentic Lucknowi style. The mutton biryani is the star. Seating is basic but the food makes up for it.

name: Rahim's Nihari & Kulcha
address: Tunda Wale ki Gali, Chowk, Lucknow
description: Operating since the 1890s, Rahim's is one of the oldest food establishments in Lucknow. Famous for the Nihari-Kulcha combo that people queue up for at dawn. A true taste of old Lucknow.
reviews_summary: Legendary spot. The Nihari is rich and deeply spiced. Opens at dawn, closes by 10 AM. Worth the early morning trip to Chowk.

name: Prakash Ki Kulfi
address: Aminabad Market, Lucknow
description: Prakash Ki Kulfi has been serving rich, creamy kulfis in Aminabad for generations. Their Malai Ki Kulfi is slow-set and incredibly dense. A legendary dessert stop after a kebab feast at nearby Tunday Kababi.
reviews_summary: Best kulfi in Lucknow, hands down. The matka kulfi is divine. Go after eating at Tunday Kababi. Very affordable.

name: Idrees Biryani
address: Chowk, Lucknow
description: A Chowk institution serving traditional Lucknowi biryani and Mughlai dishes for decades. The narrow lanes of Chowk add to the old-world charm. Their Nihari-Sheermal combo is legendary.
reviews_summary: Old school Lucknow food at its best. Go early for the best experience. Nihari lovers swear by this place.

name: Dastarkhwan
address: Gomti Nagar, Lucknow (nearest to IIIT)
description: Dastarkhwan is a popular chain of Mughlai restaurants across Lucknow. Known for consistent quality across outlets. A safe choice for authentic Lucknowi kebabs and biryani without the Chowk trip.
reviews_summary: Reliable quality every time. Multiple outlets make it convenient. The Gomti Nagar branch is closest to IIIT. Great for takeaway too.

name: Taco Bell (Lulu Mall)
address: Food Court, Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: Mexican-inspired fast food at Lulu Mall food court. A fun alternative to burgers and pizza when you want something different. The Crunchwrap is a student favorite.
reviews_summary: Good Tex-Mex at mall prices. The Crunchwrap is filling. Nice for a quick, different meal. Affordable combo options.

name: Keventers (Lulu Mall)
address: Lulu Mall, Sushant Golf City, Lucknow
description: A classic milkshake brand inside Lulu Mall. Their thick bottled shakes are perfect for sipping while walking through the mall. Wide range from classic chocolate to Ferrero Rocher.
reviews_summary: Great milkshakes. The iconic glass bottles are Instagram-worthy. Good variety. A bit pricey for milkshakes but they're thick and filling.

name: Chhappan Bhog
address: Gomti Nagar, Lucknow
description: A well-known vegetarian restaurant and sweet shop chain in Lucknow. Perfect for a pure veg thali or grabbing boxes of sweets during festivals. Their Rabri is a local favorite.
reviews_summary: Best vegetarian thali in Lucknow. Sweets are fresh and authentic. Great for gifting boxes during festivals. Clean and well-run.

name: Sky Glass Brewing Co.
address: Vibhuti Khand, Gomti Nagar, Lucknow
description: Sky Glass Brewing Co. is a premium rooftop brewery in Gomti Nagar. Known for its in-house craft beers, stunning skyline views, wood-fired pizzas, and vibrant nightlife atmosphere. One of Lucknow's most popular spots for a special evening out.
reviews_summary: Great ambiance and craft beers. Rooftop view is stunning at night. A bit pricey but the vibe is unmatched. Popular weekend destination for young professionals and college students.
